Customer.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) RTRIM(A1_COD)+RTRIM(A1_LOJA) AS id, RTRIM(A1_CGC) AS partyId, RTRIM(A1_NREDUZ) AS tradeName, RTRIM(A1_NOME) AS legalName, A1_SALDUP AS outstandingBalance FROM SA1{{SUFFIX}} WHERE D_E_L_E_T_ <> '*' AND (@search = '' OR A1_NOME LIKE '%'+@search+'%' OR A1_CGC LIKE '%'+@search+'%') ORDER BY A1_COD

Product.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) RTRIM(B1_COD) AS id, RTRIM(B1_COD) AS sku, RTRIM(B1_DESC) AS name, B1_PRV1 AS unitPrice, B1_ESTSEG AS stock FROM SB1{{SUFFIX}} WHERE D_E_L_E_T_ <> '*' AND (@search = '' OR B1_DESC LIKE '%'+@search+'%' OR B1_COD LIKE '%'+@search+'%') ORDER BY B1_COD

Invoice.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) RTRIM(F2_DOC)+RTRIM(F2_SERIE) AS id, RTRIM(F2_DOC) AS number, RTRIM(F2_SERIE) AS series, F2_EMISSAO AS issueDate, F2_VALBRUT AS grandTotal, RTRIM(F2_CLIENTE)+RTRIM(F2_LOJA) AS customerId FROM SF2{{SUFFIX}} WHERE D_E_L_E_T_ <> '*' ORDER BY F2_EMISSAO DESC

Supplier.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) RTRIM(A2_COD)+RTRIM(A2_LOJA) AS id, RTRIM(A2_NOME) AS legalName, RTRIM(A2_CGC) AS partyId FROM SA2{{SUFFIX}} WHERE D_E_L_E_T_ <> '*' AND (@search = '' OR A2_NOME LIKE '%'+@search+'%') ORDER BY A2_COD
